account_id.description: The unique identifier(s) of the account(s) that will have the installment plan (UUID; 36 chars).

merchant_reference.description: Identification of the installment plan (MAX 255; MIN 3)

installments_plan.description: Definition of installments available for each scenario

installment.description: The number of monthly installments shoppers can choose

rate.description: The rate applied to the final amount of the transaction by the payment provider after using installments. The value should be entered as a multiplier, not a percentage. For example, to apply a 20% rate, enter `1.20` instead of `20`.

financial_costs.description: Optional financial costs details for this installment option.

type.description:
The financial cost type identifier (MIN 3; MAX 255).
Example: `CFT`, `TEA`, `CET`, `CAT`

rate.description: The financial cost rate as a decimal number (e.g., 45.25 for 45.25%).

type.description: Installment’s type. Only available for Ecuador and Mexico. Merchant refers to payments deferred with interest, and Issuer refer to payments deferred without interest

iin.description: The issuer identification number (IIN) refers to the first few digits of a payment card number issued by a financial institution (MAX 8; MIN 6)

first_installment_deferral.description: The amount of months to wait to debit the first installment (MAX: 3).

amount.description: The amounts that the installment plan will be available for. If null, available for any amount.

currency.description: The currency used to make the payment (ISO 4217 MAX 3; MIN 3)

min_value.description: The minimum amount the installment plan will be available to use (multiple of 0.0001).

max_value.description: The maximum amount the installment plan will be available to use (multiple of 0.0001).

availability.description: The dates that the installment plan will be available for. If null then it does not have a finish date

start_at.description: The start date that the installment plan will be available to use (UTC format)

finish_at.description: The end date until the installment plan will be available to use (UTC format)

parameters.name: account_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the account. Find it on the [Yuno dashboard](https://dashboard.y.uno) (UUID; 36 chars).

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: Currency used for filtering plans ([ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217); 3 chars).

parameters.name: iin
parameters.description: [Optional] - The issuer identification number (IIN) refers to the first few digits of a payment card number issued by a financial institution (MAX 8; MIN 6). In case you defined an iin for the installments plan, you can use it to filter the response. Alternative to `card_number` — send either `iin` or `card_number`, not both.

parameters.name: card_number
parameters.description: [Optional] - The full card number (PAN). Must be numeric and between 13–19 digits. When provided, it is securely tokenized and used for installment calculation. Alternative to `iin` — send either `card_number` or `iin`, not both.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: [Optional] - The amount that the installment plan is available for. In case you defined an amount range for the installments plan, you can use it to filter the response.

parameters.name: installment_code
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the installment plan.
